data.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Root cause: sprint-list-epics.sh silently falls back to empty index when the ticket reducer fails transiently during worktree startup. The 2>/dev/null on the reducer call swallows errors, and the fallback produces an empty index that reports 'No open epics found.' Fix: added retry loop that detects empty index with non-empty tracker dir and retries (configurable via SPRINT_MAX_RETRIES and SPRINT_RETRY_WAIT env vars).
